'''Dees Harbright''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a member of [[House Harbright]].

==Biography==
He was a cousin once removed of [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Borert Harbright]], and the senior [[Vice President/Legends|vice president]] of marketing for the [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation|Salliche Ag Corporation]]. He had a slight resemblance to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1stm}}
